LongParameterList:UtilityModule.kt$UtilityModule$( @ApplicationContext context: Context, appConfig: AppConfig, settingsRepository: SettingsRepository, modelTypeDetector: ModelTypeDetector, whisperModelConfigBuilder: com.bmdstudios.flit.utils.model.WhisperModelConfigBuilder, transducerModelConfigBuilder: com.bmdstudios.flit.utils.model.TransducerModelConfigBuilder, senseVoiceModelConfigBuilder: com.bmdstudios.flit.utils.model.SenseVoiceModelConfigBuilder, denoiserModelFactory: com.bmdstudios.flit.utils.model.DenoiserModelFactory, punctuationModelFactory: com.bmdstudios.flit.utils.model.PunctuationModelFactory, textPostProcessor: com.bmdstudios.flit.utils.text.TextPostProcessor )
MaxLineLength:ChunkDao.kt$ChunkDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM chunks WHERE note_id = :noteId AND is_deleted = 0 AND position_start >= :start AND position_end <= :end ORDER BY position_start ASC")
MaxLineLength:DenoiserModelFactory.kt$DenoiserModelFactory$Timber.d("Denoiser model directory does not exist: ${denoiserModelDir.absolutePath}, skipping denoising")
MaxLineLength:DenoiserModelFactory.kt$DenoiserModelFactory$Timber.d("No denoiser model file found in ${denoiserModelDir.absolutePath}. Available files: ${fileNames.joinToString()}")

MaxLineLength:ModelConfigLoader.kt$ModelConfigLoader$Timber.i("Note: If these values don't match your local models_config.json, you may need to clean rebuild and reinstall the app (assets are bundled at build time)")
MaxLineLength:ModelDownloadViewModel.kt$ModelDownloadViewModel$Timber.w("Optional model $modelName download reported success but model not found at ${modelDir.absolutePath}")

MaxLineLength:ModelDownloadViewModel.kt$ModelDownloadViewModel$Timber.w(error, "Failed to download optional model ${model.directoryName} to ${modelDir.absolutePath}, continuing without it. Error: ${error.message}")

MaxLineLength:NoteCategoryDao.kt$NoteCategoryDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM category INNER JOIN note_categories ON category.id = note_categories.category_id WHERE note_categories.note_id = :noteId AND note_categories.is_deleted = 0 AND category.is_deleted = 0")

MaxLineLength:NoteCategoryDao.kt$NoteCategoryDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM notes INNER JOIN note_categories ON notes.id = note_categories.note_id WHERE note_categories.category_id = :categoryId AND note_categories.is_deleted = 0 AND notes.is_deleted = 0")
MaxLineLength:NoteCategoryDao.kt$NoteCategoryDao$@Query("UPDATE note_categories SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = :updatedAt, ver = ver + 1 WHERE note_id = :noteId AND category_id = :categoryId")
MaxLineLength:NoteDao.kt$NoteDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM notes WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (title LIKE '%' || :query || '%' OR text LIKE '%' || :query || '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC")
MaxLineLength:NoteDao.kt$NoteDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM notes WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND created_at >= :startDate AND created_at <= :endDate ORDER BY created_at DESC")
MaxLineLength:PunctuationModelFactory.kt$PunctuationModelFactory$"Please use a proper CT transformer punctuation model (e.g., sherpa-onnx-punct-ct-transformer-zh-en-vocab272727-2024-04-12). "
MaxLineLength:PunctuationModelFactory.kt$PunctuationModelFactory$Timber.d("No punctuation model file found in ${punctuationModelDir.absolutePath}. Available files: ${fileNames.joinToString()}")
MaxLineLength:PunctuationModelFactory.kt$PunctuationModelFactory$Timber.d("Punctuation model directory does not exist: ${punctuationModelDir.absolutePath}, skipping punctuation")

MaxLineLength:PunctuationModelFactory.kt$PunctuationModelFactory$val hasDecoder = allFiles.any { it.isFile && it.name.contains(ModelConstants.DECODER_PATTERN, ignoreCase = true) && it.extension.equals(ModelConstants.ONNX_EXTENSION, ignoreCase = true) }

MaxLineLength:PunctuationModelFactory.kt$PunctuationModelFactory$val hasEncoder = allFiles.any { it.isFile && it.name.contains(ModelConstants.ENCODER_PATTERN, ignoreCase = true) && it.extension.equals(ModelConstants.ONNX_EXTENSION, ignoreCase = true) }

MaxLineLength:PunctuationModelFactory.kt$PunctuationModelFactory$val hasJoiner = allFiles.any { it.isFile && it.name.contains(ModelConstants.JOINER_PATTERN, ignoreCase = true) && it.extension.equals(ModelConstants.ONNX_EXTENSION, ignoreCase = true) }
MaxLineLength:RelationshipDao.kt$RelationshipDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM relationships WHERE (note_a_id = :noteId OR note_b_id = :noteId) AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC")
MaxLineLength:RelationshipDao.kt$RelationshipDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM relationships WHERE (note_a_id = :noteId OR note_b_id = :noteId) AND type = :type AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC")
MaxLineLength:RelationshipDao.kt$RelationshipDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM relationships WHERE note_a_id = :noteAId AND note_b_id = :noteBId AND type = :type AND is_deleted = 0")
MaxLineLength:RelationshipDao.kt$RelationshipDao$@Query("UPDATE relationships SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = :updatedAt, ver = ver + 1 WHERE note_a_id = :noteId OR note_b_id = :noteId")
MaxLineLength:SyncRepository.kt$SyncRepository$onFailure = { e -> Timber.tag(SYNC_TAG).w(e, "Note-categories: push failed for note=${v.noteId}, category=${v.categoryId}") }
MaxLineLength:SyncRepository.kt$SyncRepository$val categoryCoreById = categoryDao.getAllCategoriesForSync().filter { it.core_id != null }.associate { it.id to it.core_id!! }
MaxLineLength:SyncRepository.kt$SyncRepository$val categoryCoreToLocal = categoryDao.getAllCategoriesForSync().filter { it.core_id != null }.associate { it.core_id!! to it.id }
MaxLineLength:SyncRepository.kt$SyncRepository$val link = noteCategoryDao.getAllNoteCategoriesForSync().find { it.note_id == note.id && it.category_id == category.id } ?: return emptyList()
MaxLineLength:SyncRepository.kt$SyncRepository$val noteCoreById = noteDao.getAllNotesForSync().filter { it.core_id != null }.associate { it.id to it.core_id!! }
MaxLineLength:SyncRepository.kt$SyncRepository$val noteCoreToLocal = noteDao.getAllNotesForSync().filter { it.core_id != null }.associate { it.core_id!! to it.id }
MaxLineLength:SyncRepository.kt$SyncRepository$val noteCoreToLocal = noteDao.getNotesByCoreIds(chunks.map { it.noteId }.distinct()).associate { it.core_id!! to it.id }

MaxLineLength:TransducerModelConfigBuilder.kt$TransducerModelConfigBuilder$Timber.d("Found transducer model files - encoder: $encoderFile, decoder: $decoderFile, joiner: $joinerFile, tokens: $tokensFile")

MayBeConst:Speaker.kt$// Please download the model file from // https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/tag/speaker-recongition-models // and put it inside the assets directory. // // Please don't put it in a subdirectory of assets private val modelName = "3dspeaker_speech_eres2net_base_sv_zh-cn_3dspeaker_16k.onnx"
